headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts and Saquon Barkley led Philadelphia to another impressive performance on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts and Saquon Barkley help the Eagles run away from the Bengals for a 37-17 win

headlines.description: — During an impassioned pregame speech, Jameis Winston asked his Browns teammates to believe.
headlines.shortLinkText: Winston throws 3 TD passes as Browns stun Jackson, Ravens 29-24 to end 5-game losing streak

headlines.description: — Jared Goff threw three touchdown passes but was far from the star for the Detroit Lions in one of the highest-scoring games in franchise history.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jared Goff throws for 3 TDs and Lions win 5th straight, dominating Titans 52-14

headlines.description: — Kyler Murray never lost confidence. Even with the Arizona Cardinals down by two scores in the fourth quarter, he knew he was capable of making the plays his team needed.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kyler Murray rallies Cardinals to 28-27 win over Dolphins in Tua Tagovailoa's return

events.name: New York Jets at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Inches from the goal line with one last chance to punch in the game-winning score, the New England Patriots proved to be tough enough to beat Aaron Rodgers and the stumbling New York Jets.
headlines.shortLinkText: With Maye out, 'soft' Patriots come back to send Rodgers and Jets to 5th straight loss

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Atlanta is still working on not being the same old Falcons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins throws for 276 yards and 4 TDs as Falcons beat Bucs 31-26 to take control of NFC South

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Jacksonville Jaguars

headlines.description: — The Green Bay Packers might have to play without quarterback Jordan Love again.
headlines.shortLinkText: With Love watching from the sideline, the Packers beat the Jaguars 30-27 for 4th straight win

headlines.description: — Joe Mixon evaded one defender and dragged a defensive back into the end zone with him on a 14-yard touchdown run in the highlight of yet another big game to help the Houston Texans beat the Indianapolis Colts on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stroud throws TD pass, Mixon adds score as Texans outlast Colts 23-20

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Ladd McConkey was a downfield threat while helping lead the University of Georgia to a pair of College Football Playoff championships.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ladd McConkey's 2 touchdowns propel Chargers to 26-8 victory over Saints

headlines.description: — Josh Allen threw two touchdown passes and the surging Buffalo Bills turned his first interception of the season into an afterthought, pummeling the Seattle Seahawks 31-10 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen throws 2 TD passes and the Bills cruise past the Seahawks 31-10

headlines.description: — Sean Payton didn't like the way the Denver Broncos started or finished their 28-14 win over the injury-riddled Carolina Panthers. In between, there was plenty for him to enjoy, though.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rookie Bo Nix has 3 TD passes in leading the Broncos to a 28-14 win over the Panthers

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes didn't make many mistakes Sunday, but one of his few errors could've cost the Chiefs the game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes passes for 262 yards and 2 TDs, Chiefs beat Raiders 27-20 to improve to 7-0

headlines.description: — Jayden Daniels had a couple of very simple thoughts going through his head with the Washington Commanders needing to make a long-distance throw to beat the Chicago Bears.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jayden Daniels' Hail Mary TD to Noah Brown gives Commanders 18-15 win over Bears

headlines.description: — One dominant quarter against Dallas proved to be enough for the San Francisco 49ers to head into their bye week on a high note.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brock Purdy helps the 49ers bounce back with a 30-24 victory over the Cowboys
